The migration completed successfully on Tuesday. Furthermore, all data integrity checks passed without issue across the 14 affected tables. Moreover, the rollback procedure was tested in staging and verified by two senior engineers. Additionally, the new partial indexes are performing as expected, with EXPLAIN ANALYZE showing the bitmap scans we wanted. Notably, p99 query latency on the orders endpoint dropped from 340ms to 95ms. Ultimately, the project finished two days ahead of the original schedule, leaving room for the cleanup tickets we'd deferred.
